registers.name: MASK
registers.comment: SDIO mask register,             Address offset: 0x3C

TXUNDERRIE.desc: Tx FIFO UnderRun Error Interrupt Enable

RXOVERRIE.desc: Rx FIFO OverRun Error Interrupt Enable

TXFIFOHEIE.desc: Tx FIFO Half Empty interrupt Enable

RXFIFOHFIE.desc: Rx FIFO Half Full interrupt Enable

TXDAVLIE.desc: Data available in Tx FIFO interrupt Enable

RXDAVLIE.desc: Data available in Rx FIFO interrupt Enable

SDIOITIE.desc: SDIO Mode Interrupt Received interrupt Enable

CEATAENDIE.desc: CE-ATA command completion signal received Interrupt Enable

registers.name: FIFO
registers.comment: SDIO data FIFO register,        Address offset: 0x80

registers.comment: SPI_I2S configuration register,                     Address offset: 0x1C

CHLEN.desc: Channel length (number of bits per audio channel)
